fields.title: Fix prompt-modes session_start test regressions
fields.notes: Observed while running npm run gate for tau-6jj. vitest fails in test/prompt-modes-session-start.test.ts: three failing assertions in session_start behavior (keeps last mode, prefers persisted mode, non-interactive no override). This appears unrelated to sandbox notice timeout text change in extensions/tau/src/sandbox/sandbox-change.ts.
